paths.drizzle-orm: Domain layer cannot import 'drizzle-orm'. Reason: Domain must stay framework-free (see docs/decisions/0003-ddd-layering.md, docs/decisions/0009-rigidity-map.md Tier 1). Fix: Move Drizzle usage to src/{feature}/infrastructure/, use a Mapper (src/{feature}/infrastructure/mappers/) to convert rows to domain entities.
paths.postgres: Domain layer cannot import 'postgres'. Reason: Domain must stay framework-free (ADR 0003, ADR 0009 Tier 1). Fix: Use the 'postgres' client only in src/shared/infrastructure/db/client.ts or {feature}/infrastructure/.
paths.elysia: Domain layer cannot import 'elysia'. Reason: Domain entities and factories are framework-free (ADR 0003, ADR 0006). Fix: HTTP concerns belong in src/{feature}/presentation/; derive AuthContext via the requireAuth macro (ADR 0007) and pass it into domain factories as a value object.
paths.better-auth: Domain layer cannot import 'better-auth'. Reason: BetterAuth is an infrastructure concern behind an IIdentityService port (ADR 0004, ADR 0006). Fix: Use ports in src/auth/application/ports/ and implement in src/auth/infrastructure/.
paths.@bogeychan/elysia-logger: Domain layer cannot import logger adapters directly. Reason: Logger is a port (ILogger) injected via the shared kernel (ADR 0003). Fix: Depend on ILogger from src/shared/application/ports/, adapter lives in src/shared/infrastructure/logger/.
paths.pino: Domain layer cannot import 'pino' directly (same reason as @bogeychan/elysia-logger, ADR 0003). Fix: Use the ILogger port from src/shared/application/ports/.

paths.drizzle-orm: Application layer cannot import 'drizzle-orm'. Reason: Use cases talk to ports, not ORMs (ADR 0003). Fix: Define a Repository port in this feature's application/ports/ and let infrastructure/ implement it with Drizzle.
paths.postgres: Application layer cannot import 'postgres'. Reason: Use cases talk to ports, not DB clients (ADR 0003). Fix: Inject the port defined in application/ports/; the adapter in infrastructure/ may use 'postgres'.

paths.drizzle-orm: Application layer cannot import 'drizzle-orm'. Reason: Use cases talk to ports, not ORMs (ADR 0003). Fix: Define a Repository port in this feature's application/ports/ and let infrastructure/ implement it with Drizzle.
paths.postgres: Application layer cannot import 'postgres'. Reason: Use cases talk to ports, not DB clients (ADR 0003). Fix: Inject the port defined in application/ports/; the adapter in infrastructure/ may use 'postgres'.

patterns.message: Cannot import from domain/internal/. Reason: Only the domain/index.ts barrel is a legal entry point (ADR 0003, CONTEXT D-11). Fix: Import from '{feature}/domain' (the barrel) and use getXxxService(ctx) factory, never instantiate classes directly.

paths.drizzle-orm: shared/kernel cannot import 'drizzle-orm'. Reason: The kernel (Result/Brand/UUID/DomainError) must be framework-free so any layer can use it (ADR 0003 §kernel). Fix: Keep kernel files pure TypeScript; put ORM bindings in src/shared/infrastructure/db/.
paths.postgres: shared/kernel cannot import 'postgres'. Reason: framework-free kernel (ADR 0003). Fix: Keep DB client code in src/shared/infrastructure/db/client.ts.
paths.elysia: shared/kernel cannot import 'elysia'. Reason: kernel is re-usable across any framework surface (ADR 0003). Fix: HTTP primitives live in src/shared/presentation/.
paths.better-auth: shared/kernel cannot import 'better-auth'. Reason: kernel is framework-free (ADR 0003, ADR 0004). Fix: BetterAuth adapter belongs in src/auth/infrastructure/.
paths.@bogeychan/elysia-logger: shared/kernel cannot import logger adapters. Reason: kernel is framework-free (ADR 0003). Fix: ILogger port lives in src/shared/application/ports/.
paths.pino: shared/kernel cannot import 'pino'. Reason: kernel is framework-free (ADR 0003). Fix: ILogger port in src/shared/application/ports/.
